text:
In a cozy little town called Willowbrook, lived a curious cat named Whiskers. Every morning, he would stretch wearily and leap onto his favorite branch overlooking the lazy river. He loved watches the ducks play. One sunny day, a peculiar hummingbird fluttered by.

"Oh dear," thought Whiskers. "Why don't I try?"

So he chased the bird. Followed it through fields and forests. Finally, up a tower where fig leaves hung. The bird stopped and sang. "You prefer flowers?"

"Yep! But yours?"

"It blooms with dreams."

"Mine is berries."

They laughed together. Then the bird fluttered down. Near its neck was a tiny silken scarf. "Take this."

Whiskers twitched his nose. It felt strange. Like feathers. "Thanks."

Tomorrow he'd unravel it. But for now, he prowled. He loved mysteries.

Nothing weird happened.

Then he heard a rustle.

Something big.

Across fields.
